title: outbox page number accepted as u32 but stored as i64 offset — overflow on page > 46M
description: In server.rs outbox(), page is Query<PaginationQuery> where page: Option<u32> (max ~4.3 billion). The offset is computed as (page as i64 - 1) * per_page. For page values larger than about 46M the offset exceeds i64::MAX / 20 and the multiplication overflows i64, producing a negative offset that SQLite interprets as 0, silently serving page 1 again instead of an empty page or an error. No practical user hits this but a fuzzer or a broken client will.
close_reason: Fixed: outbox offset uses saturating arithmetic.
